title: デビュー戦の後に・運命のレース

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru, the Umamusume blessed
with divine luck, performs well in her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intending to let the fates decide her next goal,
she asks me to draw a fortune slip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the will of the fortune slip, it seems our
next race is the Yayoi Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first hurdle of spring is here!
Matikanefukukitaru's battle has begun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the will of the fortune slip, it seems our
next race is the Spring Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first hurdle of spring is here!
Matikanefukukitaru's battle has begun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the will of the fortune slip, it seems our
next race is the Mainichi Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first hurdle of spring is here!
Matikanefukukitaru's battle has begun!
